title: Tarzan's Three Challenges
writer: Edgar Rice Burroughs, Robert Day, Berne Giler
actors: Jock Mahoney, Woody Strode, Tsuruko Kobayashi
plot: The spiritual leader of an oriental country is dying. The leader's evil brother is plotting to prevent the youthful heir from assuming his rightful position. Tarzan is summoned to protect him and he must face three tests of strength.
